text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With only a few days left until the Aoba Sho,
Mejiro Ardan arranges a meeting to prepare.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And by a hair's breadth, it's Sakura Chiyono O in
first place!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I enter my office to find Mejiro Ardan intently
watching footage of past races.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I was studying how Chiyono O and Yaeno have
been running lately.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
They've been performing spectacularly well in
their most recent races.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: So well, in fact, that I can hardly look away.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This is the first time I've seen Mejiro Ardan stress
over other Umamusume like this—especially with
her own race coming up.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Chiyono O and Yaeno Muteki must really
mean a lot to her if she's this worked up...
choice_data_list: You'll be facing them after the Aoba Sho.
You'll be facing them after the Aoba Sho.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Yes, I will. I'm certain they'll be entering the
Japanese Derby.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...However, the Aoba Sho is what matters now. As such, it follows that...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
My goal should be to surpass the finest racer the
Mejiro family has ever known. That, and nothing
else.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
...Oh, it appears that I may have gotten
sidetracked. Shall we begin our meeting?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: With that, Mejiro Ardan turns off the TV.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And then... the day of the Aoba Sho arrives.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...That should do it. I'm ready to go at any time.
choice_data_list:
Let's do our best today, and put ourselves in
good stead for the Derby.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Yes. As always, I shall race at my current best,
and without letting my pride get the better of me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Now then... I shall be off.
